title: molinia distans
intro: Molinia distans, also known as purple moor-grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Molinia distans include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Molinia distans is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
